button.label: charcoalEditor2
button.command: import maya.cmds as cmds if not cmds.pluginInfo('CharcoalEditor2', q=True, l=True): cmds.loadPlugin('CharcoalEditor2') mel.eval("charcoalEditor2;")

button.label: ngSkinTools2.2.4
brSmoothWeights 1.2.0
button.command: import maya.cmds as cmds if not cmds.pluginInfo('brSmoothWeights', q=True, l=True): cmds.loadPlugin('brSmoothWeights') mel.eval("brSmoothWeightsToolCtx; toolPropertyWindow;")
